description.value:
Trigger The strigoi is reduced to 0 HP

Effect The strigoi uses Shadow Form. They can take move actions to move toward their coffin even though they're at 0 HP. While at 0 HP in this form, the strigoi is unaffected by further damage. Once the strigoi reaches their coffin, or if they haven't done so within 2 hours, they automatically return to their physical form, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious].

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path #215: To Blot Out the Sun
